name: Alderan Resources Ltd
description: Alderan Resources Ltd is an Australia-based mineral exploration company focused on the discovery and development of critical metal and gold deposits. The company's primary projects include copper and gold exploration in Utah, USA, such as the Detroit, Cactus, and Valley projects, as well as lithium exploration in Minas Gerais, Brazil. Alderan is dedicated to creating shareholder value through systematic exploration of its highly prospective tenement portfolio.
